get_creative.configuration.title: Get Creative Configs
create.hint.mechanical_arm.error.title: Invalid Assembly Targets
create.hint.mechanical_arm.not_adjacent: This _Mechanical_ _Arm_ has invalid Assembly _targets._ To process items, the Mechanical Arm must be _directly adjacent_ to the targeted block.
create.hint.mechanical_arm.interference: This _Mechanical_ _Arm_ can't perform Assembly because _a block above_ the target is taking priority for belt processing.
create.hint.mechanical_arm.invalid_block: This _Mechanical_ _Arm_ has invalid Assembly _targets._ To process items, the targeted block must be a _belt or depot._
death.attack.get_creative.industrial_fan: %s was sliced up by a spinning fan
block.get_creative.industrial_fan.toolti: A larger version of an _Encased Fan_, without the casing.
A _lower-capacity_ variant of _Fluid Tank_ which can be _manually_ filled or drained with a _Bucket_.
block.get_creative.glue_spreader.tooltip: When _powered by redstone_, blocks in front of _adjacent Glue Spreaders_ are glued together.
When _powered by redstone_, connected blocks in front of the _Encapsulator_ are stored into a placeable _Capsule_ item. (as if assembling a contraption)
block.get_creative.hinge_bearing.tooltip: Allows its _contraption_ to be manually _interacted_ with to push it _open_ and pull it _shut_.
block.get_creative.haunted_cogwheel.tool: _Haunted_ by a temperamental soul which spins the wheel. _Doesn't like not being in control!_
block.get_creative.clockwork_motor.toolt: Wind it up with a _Wind-Up Key_ or _Hand Crank_ and it will generate _Rotational Force_ as it winds down
block.get_creative.breeze_whirler.toolti: Generates _Rotational Force_ from the power of a captured _Breeze_
block.get_creative.oak_handle.tooltip.su: _Decorate_ your _Hinge Bearing_ contraptions with a large handle which will also play a _door opening sound_.
Grants _handheld control_ over a single _Redstone Link_ frequency assigned to its _single_ _button_.
Binds the remote to the _Link's Frequency_.
get_creative.linked_keypad.press_keybind: Press %s-%s, %s or %s, to bind this frequency to the respective key
Grants _handheld control_ over _Redstone Link_ frequencies assigned to its _eleven_ _buttons_.
_Toggles_ the keypad. _Movement_ _controls_ are taken over while its active.
Enables _Bind Mode_, press one of the _eleven controls_ to bind it to the _Links' Frequency_.
Places the Keypad into the Lectern for easy activation. (R-Click while Sneaking to retrieve it)
get_creative.linked_macro_controller.pre: Press %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s or %s, to bind this frequency to the respective key
item.get_creative.linked_macro_controlle: Grants _handheld control_ over _Redstone Link_ frequencies assigned to its _fourteen_ _buttons_.
_Toggles_ the macro controller. _Movement_ _controls_ are taken over while its active.
Enables _Bind Mode_, press one of the _fourteen controls_ to bind it to the _Links' Frequency_.
Places the Macro Controller into the Lectern for easy activation. (R-Click while Sneaking to retrieve it)
get_creative.ponder.mechanical_arm_proce: Mechanical Arms can process items on directly adjacent belts or Depots.
First, before it's placed, the Mechanical Arm must be assigned its targets.
Right-Click to cycle between Input (Blue), Output (Yellow), and Assembly (Purple)
Once placed, the Arm will try to process items on adjacent selected Assembly targets.
